zh.Church of Saint Mary the Virgin, Henlow,: 英國英格蘭貝德福爾特拉爾 貝德福爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Tilley於大約1465年出生在英國貝德福爾亨洛福時，他的父親Nathan Tilley23歲，母親Adelaide Tylle21歲。他於大約1488年與Johan Smallacombe在英國英格蘭貝德福爾亨洛福結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於從1520年9月1日到1520年12月4日在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國貝德福爾亨洛福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Tilley于大约1465年出生在英国貝德福爾亨洛福时，他的父亲Nathan Tilley23岁，母亲Adelaide Tylle21岁。他于大约1488年与Johan Smallacombe在英国英格兰貝德福爾亨洛福结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于从1520年9月1日到1520年12月4日在他的家乡，埋葬在英国貝德福爾亨洛福。

nameMeanings.name: Tilley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Tilly-sur-Seulles (Calvados) or Tilly (Eure), France.

English: habitational name from Tyley in Wotton under Edge (Gloucestershire), Tiley in Minterne Magna (Dorset), or Tilley (Shropshire). The Gloucestershire and Dorset placenames derive from Old English tigel ‘tile’ + lēah ‘wood, woodland clearing’. The Shropshire placename derives from an uncertain first element + Old English lēah.
English: occupational name from Middle English tilie ‘one who tills the land, a husbandman’. Compare Tiller .

variants.name: Tillie
meanings: English (northern England and southern Scotland): variant of   Tilley  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Tiller
meanings: English (southern, especially Hampshire): occupational name from Middle English tiliere, tilyer ‘one who tills the soil, husbandman, farmer, farm laborer’. This is a derivative of Old English tilian ‘to till (the soil)’, Middle English tilie. There has been some confusion of this name with Tyler .

variants.name: Tiley
meanings: English (Gloucestershire, Somerset and Wiltshire): variant of   Tilley  .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Tilley was born about 1465, in Henlow, Bedfordshire, England, his father, Nathan Tilley, was 23 and his mother, Adelaide Tylle, was 21. He married Johan Smallacombe about 1488, in Henlow, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died from 1 September 1520 to 4 December 1520, in his hometown, and was buried in Henlow, Bedfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Tilley est né environ 1465, à Henlow, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Nathan Tilley, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Adelaide Tylle, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Johan Smallacombe environ 1488, à Henlow, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé du 1 septembre 1520 au 4 décembre 1520, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Henlow, Bedfordshire, Angleterre.

de.Church of Saint Mary the Virgin, Henlow,: Central Bedfordshire, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Tilley um 1465 in Henlow, Bedfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nathan Tilley 23 und seine Mutter Adelaide Tylle 21. Er hat um 1488 in Henlow, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom Johan Smallacombe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb von 1. September 1520 bis 4. Dezember 1520 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Henlow, Bedfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Tilley è nato il circa 1465 nel Henlow, Bedfordshire, England, il suo padre, Nathan Tilley, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Adelaide Tylle, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Johan Smallacombe circa 1488, nel Henlow, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì da 1 settembre 1520 a 4 dicembre 1520, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Henlow, Bedfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Tilleyが約1465年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアヘンロウで生まれた時，父Nathan Tilleyは23歳，母Adelaide Tylleは21歳であった。約1488年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアヘンロウでJohan Smallacombeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼はから1520年9月1日まで1520年12月4日に故郷で死去し，イギリスベドフォードシュアイアヘンロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Tilley(이)가 대략 1465년 영국 베드퍼드실르 헨로에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nathan Tilley(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelaide Tylle(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1488년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 헨로에서 Johan Smallacombe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1520년 9월 1일부터 1520년 12월 4일까지 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 베드퍼드실르 헨로에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Tilley nasceu aproximadamente 1465, em Henlow, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nathan Tilley, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Adelaide Tylle, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Johan Smallacombe aproximadamente 1488, em Henlow, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu de 1 de setembro de 1520 a 4 de dezembro de 1520, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Henlow, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Tilley родился около 1465 г. в местности хенлоу, бедфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Nathan Tilley было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Adelaide Tylle, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Johan Smallacombe около 1488 г. в местности хенлоу, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер с 1 сентября 1520 по 4 декабря 1520 в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности хенлоу, бедфордшир, Англия.
